description: Letter-writing practice or draft. In a combination of Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic. The 'sender' is [...] b. Ibrāhīm and the 'addressee' is a Fatimid dignitary titled Fāris al-Dawla wa-Ḥusāmuhā. Reads, in part, ḥadrat mawlaya al-shaykh.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
